ICrudModelDoNotCreateTypedModel Property

One Identity Manager API Server
If this flag is set, skip typed model generation for this CRUD model.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Crud
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
bool DoNotCreateTypedModel { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: Boolean
Remarks
Set this flag if this model is expected to be used only in generic calls.
